reviews.comment:
Deberían habilitar un surtidor exclusivo para motos. Nos obligan a hacer una sola cola con los autos de noche y es una perdida de tiempo e incomodidad para todos.

(Translated by Google)
They should set up a separate gas station just for motorcycles. They force us to wait in the same line as the cars at night, and it's a waste of time and an inconvenience for everyone.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15009815123652831665/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvOXN5LUtREAE

reviews.comment:
Es un agradable lugar para desayunar cuando llegó de viaje  con muy buena atención, ambiente tranquilo, wifi, baños impecables y precio quizás más bajo que en otras cafeterias.

(Translated by Google)
It's a nice place to have breakfast when you arrive from a trip, with very good service, a quiet atmosphere, Wi-Fi, spotless bathrooms, and a price that's perhaps lower than in other cafes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15009815123652831665/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvemNlaE5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Nunca tuve problemas con la nafta q me vendieron, lo digo x q otras estaciones las mezclan o te dan de menos de lo que realmente dice  El surtidor . Los playeros muy cordiales .Cinco estrellas para ellos .

(Translated by Google)
I've never had any problems with the gas they sold me. I say this because other stations mix it up or give you less than the actual price. The beach attendants are very friendly. Five stars for them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15009815123652831665/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdXRiZ29BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion! Reciben todas las tarjetas y muy poco espacio para maniobras!

(Translated by Google)
Great service! They accept all cards, but there's very little room to maneuver!
